channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sigabo Episode 10: Gabo's First Mission with Anino
item.description: The article discusses the tenth episode of the Philippine television series 'Sigabo,' focusing on the character Gabo's first mission involving his friends in the context of the show's storyline. The e...

item.title: Third Evacuation Flight from South Africa Arrives Today
item.description: The article details the arrival of a third evacuation flight from South Africa, highlighting the ongoing xenophobic tensions in the region. The government has been actively involved in repatriating ci...

item.title: Kaptagat Cycling Challenge Combines Sport with Forest Restoration
item.description: The fourth edition of the Kaptagat Cycling Challenge is using sport to drive forest restoration and support local livelihoods. The 80-kilometre race features elite, para-cycling, junior, veteran, and ...

item.title: Corruption and Fake Products in Tanzanian Markets
item.description: The article critiques the pervasive corruption and deceit in Tanzania's market system, highlighting how everyday products like honey, alcohol, and bananas are manipulated to deceive consumers. It desc...

item.title: UK discusses deporting convicted Rochdale grooming gang leader to Pakistan
item.description: The UK government is engaging in discussions with Pakistan regarding the potential deportation of Shabbir Ahmed, a leader of the Rochdale grooming gang with dual British-Pakistani citizenship. Ahmed, ...

item.title: Nigeria Launches Training for 5,000 Meter Installers to Boost Infrastructure
item.description: President Tinubu has announced a major initiative to train 5,000 meter installers as part of a broader effort to modernize Nigeria's infrastructure and create employment opportunities. The program, la...

item.title: World Cup Round of 32: Spain, Portugal, and Croatia Match Updates
item.description: The article discusses a technical issue encountered by users attempting to access live coverage of World Cup matches between Spain, Portugal, and Croatia. News Corp Australia has implemented measures ...

item.title: Muse Announces 20th Anniversary Celebrations for 'Black Holes & Revelations'
item.description: Muse frontman Matt Bellamy has revealed plans to commemorate the 20th anniversary of their 2006 album 'Black Holes & Revelations', which marked a significant milestone in the band's career. The album,...

item.title: Women's Canoeing and Kayaking League Launches in Vizag to Promote Female Participation in Sports
item.description: Visakhapatnam will host the ASMITA South Zone Women’s Canoeing and Kayaking League from July 3-4, 2026, at the Gambeeramgedda Reservoir under the Khelo India initiative. Organized by the Sports Author...

item.title: Valenzuela Schools Propose Transparent Bags and Enhanced Security Measures After Tacloban Shooting Incident
item.description: In response to the recent school shooting in Tacloban City that killed three students and wounded 20 others, school principals in Valenzuela City have suggested requiring students to use transparent b...

item.title: Indie Supergroup M.O.T.H.E.R. Discusses Collaborative Projects and New Music
item.description: The article details the formation of the indie supergroup M.O.T.H.E.R., formed by members of The Big Pink, The Kills, and Jamie T. The group emphasizes collaborative creativity, with frontman Robbie W...

item.title: UNISA's Intergenerational Dialogue Urges Youth to Protect Democracy and Combat Crime
item.description: At the University of South Africa's (UNISA) Polokwane Campus, an intergenerational dialogue hosted by the Department of Justice and Constitutional Development, GCIS, and UNISA brought together leaders...

item.title: Six BLOs Suspended for Negligence in Voter Roll Revision
item.description: Six Booth Level Officers (BLOs) have been suspended by District Collector M. Abhishikth Kishore for alleged negligence in the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls. The decision follows ...

item.title: Black Excellence and Systemic Challenges in FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: The article highlights the overwhelming presence of Black talent in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, challenging the narrative of Black people as a global minority. It critiques the underrepresentation of Bla...

item.title: Study Suggests Prolonged Sitting May Impact Longevity, But Methodology Raises Questions
item.description: A recent study published in a scientific journal has sparked debate about the health risks of prolonged sitting. The research, which followed participants for a median of 12.38 years, found a correlat...

item.title: Sergei Bobrovsky Joins Toronto Maple Leafs with Stanley Cup Experience
item.description: Sergei Bobrovsky, a 37-year-old NHL goaltender with two Stanley Cup championships, has signed a three-year, $21-million contract with the Toronto Maple Leafs after being traded by the Florida Panthers...

item.title: Court Clears Ritz-Carlton Mara Camp of Environmental Concerns
item.description: The Environment and Land Court has ruled in favor of the Ritz-Carlton Mara Safari Camp, clearing it of all environmental wrongdoing allegations. The court rejected the East Africa Tour Guide Drivers A...

item.title: Sigabo Episode 10: Sam's Stand for Human Rights in the Promised Land
item.description: The article discusses the tenth episode of the TV series 'Sigabo,' where the character Sam takes a stand for human rights in the fictional setting of the Promised Land. The episode highlights Sam's ad...

item.title: Adeniyi Adeyemi Matthew faces legal action over alleged fake agency and budget fraud
item.description: Adeniyi Adeyemi Matthew, a Nigerian man, is under investigation for allegedly creating a fake government agency and securing a ₦1.3bn budget allocation. The case has sparked public debate about corrup...

item.title: Government reduces petrol and diesel prices by Rs1.97 per litre
item.description: The Pakistani government has reduced the prices of petrol and diesel by Rs1.97 per litre, effective immediately for the week ending July 10. This adjustment follows lower global prices and aims to all...
